review_title: Best in Class solutions for Core Banking Experience
author: Manasseh A.
pros: Easely maintainable, strong API base, great architecture and friction-less integratability.
cons: The data structure is proprietary and xml-based, it can be daunting to build skill on.

review_title: Extensive Expertise in Temenos Products and Successful Project Deliveries
description: With nearly 15 years of experience working with and utilizing Temenos products, I have gained extensive expertise and deep familiarity with your solutions, which have consistently proven to be invaluable in driving success in my projects., I have successfully delivered numerous high-impact projects across various banks, leveraging Temenos’ innovative technologies to achieve outstanding results.
author: Stanka V.
pros: I appreciate the diverse range of architectures that Temenos Core supports, enabling flexibility and adaptability across various banking environments.
cons: I appreciate the versatility and functionality of Temenos Core, but one area that could be improved is the complexity of some of the configurations. While powerful, certain aspects of the setup process can be challenging and may require significant time for customization and optimization.

description: I am satified user of temenos product for almost 20 years
author: Miroslav M.
pros: overall functional capabilities, product improvements
cons: temenos customer suport, quality of fixes/patches

description: T24 transact is really great covers all the banking functions with no gaps
author: Ahmed F.
pros: Temenos Transact covers all the banking domains.
cons: some of the issues still not fixed across all the T24 releases, we still facing the daily STMT entries overwritten since R09 till R20

author: Roberta C.
pros: Handling finances accounts with Temenos Core is outstanding. The tool has a number of menu options that helps in management of accounts from opening to closure. Integrates well with the CRM for notifications and supports online transactions.
cons: Its a complex solution although its reliable.

author: Haithem A.
pros: One of the world leading core banking systems with powerful engine to run the bank Highly scalable, secure and refined core banking system with global presence and industry recognition.
cons: Maintain Lagacy version of the core Transact within lagacy technology

description: Transact is the best solution for Core Banking, and it can help save time when deploying products and exposing APIs.
author: Manh Tien N.
pros: Very flexible High performance Provide many frameworks
cons: Too many complicated framework need trainings

description: very improvement in customer experience in using the App, doing all what he need in one press which save time, money and effort
author: Hagar I.
pros: customer experience, and the friendly and simple interface, many functions are very easy to use by the customer directly without any need to visit the branches
cons: installation was a little bit not that easy, some technical issues raised while the UAT , however the team was able to solve and fixed it
author_profession: Head of IT Support and Operations

review_title: Temenos Digital :Apowerful platform that can be relied upon to provide modern digital sevices to customer
description: Temenos Digital is best suited for larger financial institutions that have the resources and strategic intent to invest in a comprehensive, scalable digital banking transformation. For smaller or more agile banks, lighter-weight or fintech-native platforms might offer a faster and more cost-effective path to digital innovation.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Temenos Digital offers a seamless, innovative platform that's helping redefine the future of banking. Their solutions are flexible, powerful and designed with customer in mind. Highly recommend
cons: While Temenos Digital provides powerful capabilities, the platform can sometimes feel complex to configure without specialized expertise. initial setup and customization may require with extra cost
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: One of the most robust core systems in the world
author: Mona E.
pros: ATM framework, AA products , Business events
cons: Release notes of core update is not clarifying the issue clearly

description: The best scalable flexible product in the market
author: Mohamed H.
pros: It’s flexibility and the new modules like TPH & Iris and how easily now we can upgrade with business disruptions
cons: the long time sometimes it take to fix a bug also lately the support is not at all good

author: TSIGE BAYRAY K.
pros: Knowledge Sharing Community Engagement Training and Development
cons: Complexity of implementation High Cost Vendor dependency
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Kidus M.
pros: 1. Overall the product is robust and scalable and can handle large volumes of concurrent transactions.2. Continues improvement on the platform
cons: (1) In today's data world, Temenos Transact is a bit behind on this and I see many clients struggling to extract basic day-to-day reports.(2) The latest version R22 comes with AA to AC conversion and there is no clear direction and it is confusing for the financial sectors whether to apply this or not. Even though Temenos recommends actually the implementors and Temenos experts don't advise this. (3) Even though the latest version R22 comes with microservice architecture, still financial sectors don't have the confidence to go to this platform. And the knowledge gap is huge.

description: Temenos Transact provides APIs flexibility for other applications to connect to and transact as well as customization with local development to suite business customers dynamic needs.
author: KING A.
pros: APIs connectivity flexibility and local customization development available for customer needs
cons: One will need to have a more resourceful hardware resources to continually be happy with Temenos Transact services and applications

description: Temenos Transact is more than just banking software—it's a strategic asset that empowers financial institutions to thrive in a digital-first world. Its adaptability, comprehensive functionality, customer-centric approach, security features, and commitment to innovation make it the go-to solution for banks looking to future-proof their operations. I wholeheartedly recommend Temenos Transact to any institution seeking to elevate its banking capabilities and drive sustainable growth.
author: Daniel O.
pros: One of the most striking aspects of Temenos Transact is its adaptability. Whether you're a small community bank or a global financial giant, the platform seamlessly scales to meet your needs. Its modular architecture allows for customization, ensuring that each institution can tailor the software to align perfectly with its unique requirements.
cons: One requires a good knowledge of Temenos Transact to the best out of it.

review_title: Core Banking You Didn't Know You NEED!
author: Onan T.
pros: how versatile Payments Hub is, when it come to Swift, ACH & SEPA payments.
cons: Currently we use R20 with the browser interface which looks outdate.

description: I have worked in the implementation of this banking core in an investment bank. Where, i developed the integrations of this banking core with other financial technologies that the client maintained.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It allows you to have in a solution all the branches of your financial institution, such as customer management, transactions and native support with other banking technologies. It is a very complete banking core, which is linked to both retail banking and investment banks, and any other company that provides financial services.
cons: Depending on the size of your company, the complexity of the implementation may vary and sometimes requires a lot of initial configuration effort.

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: T24 is a market leader in core banking systems in Africa for a number of reasons such as -Easily configurable to suit business workflows - Ability to get skilled resources/partners -Covers huge range of retail and corporate banking features
cons: T24 does not support offline processing. This is inefficient whenever the bank or branch experiences a network downtime

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Super easy to use. It’s fast and most of the random features we want, it has. Makes mortgage fundings easy.
cons: When we receive a disbursement error, it’s not easy to read the error it gives you. We spend a lot of time figuring out and pushing buttons trying to figure out what went wrong. During implementation, they took forever getting our cases worked through. They kept pushing our go live date. They moved it about 3-4 times.

review_title: Exceptional Banking Software for Seamless Customer Experience
author: Md Shahinur R.
pros: Temenos Infinity offers a wide range of features that cover every aspect of digital banking, including account opening, transaction management, loan applications, and more. The platform's versatility allowed us to tailor our offerings to meet our customers' unique needs effectively.
cons: While we have been extremely satisfied with Temenos Infinity, it's worth noting that the initial implementation and setup may require adequate planning and coordination. However, the excellent customer support team at Temenos guided us through the process, ensuring a smooth transition.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Girmachew Worku T.
pros: yes it is functional for using any where i can
cons: More function to use the already mentioned product

author: Jimmi N.
pros: Great user interface making the user journey to be easy and fun to use. Rich functions that allow for users to accomplish many banking related tasks easily without much difficulty.
cons: Experiences slow load time whenever there is a a lot of traffic to the system on occasions and really irritates users
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: It is a IDE based on eclipse, very easy to use.
description: It was really good for development of javascript code, it autocompletes. the integration of the smartphone with the backend is highly customizable
author: Carolina U.
pros: It has a preview of de screen you are designing in differents mobile platform and versions. Its an autocomplete javascript editor. You can invoke web services. Access to differents features of the smartphone, like maps, SMS.
cons: the documentation is poor, it needs to be improved, the actual one is difficult to undestand specially if you are a new user.
author_industry: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Temenos Infinity is a digital banking platform designed to help financial institutions deliver exceptional customer experiences and stay competitive in the market
author: Ahmed S.
pros: Support and Resources Temenos Support Portal,Offers access to support teams, documentation, and resources for clients and partners. Knowledge Base, Provides articles, videos, and guides on various aspects of Temenos Infinity, including loan origination and Military Lending Act configurations. Community Forum, Allows users to connect with each other, share knowledge, and get support
cons: Complexity Steep Learning Curve,The platform's advanced features and capabilities may require significant training and investment to fully utilize. - *Technical Complexity*: Integrating Infinity with existing systems and infrastructure can be complex and time-consuming.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Ahmed A.
pros: The flexibilty of applying business flows of the digital services according to each bank nature
cons: The partners eco system supporting the product in the region
